sellersCapacity.capacity: Personal Representative for a Deceased Owner
sellersCapacity.sellersCapacityDetails: Executor of the estate of Arthur Wilson (deceased 2025-09-18); Grant of Probate dated 2026-01-22. Sale proceeds payable to the estate.

propertyPack.summaryDescription: Three-bedroom semi-detached house in Didsbury, built 1932, brick under tiled roof, with a single-storey rear extension added in 2004. Executor sale.

loft.details: Hatch access from the first-floor landing; pull-down aluminium ladder.

hasStructuralAlterations.details: Single-storey rear extension (kitchen-diner), constructed 2004; brick and block to match existing, flat roof with EPDM membrane (re-covered 2019).

listedBuildingConsent.details: Property is not listed and not within a conservation area.

deedRestrictionConsent.details: No relevant restrictive covenants identified in the title register.

electricalWorkSince2005.details: Full rewire and consumer-unit replacement following the roof re-cover; carried out by a NICEIC-registered contractor.

itemsToRemove.details: Garden shed (sentimental — to be relocated to the executor's daughter's property); freestanding bookcase in the front reception; pendant light over the dining table (family heirloom).

itemsToInclude.details: All carpets and floor coverings throughout; integrated dishwasher; fitted wardrobes in all three bedrooms; greenhouse in the rear garden; pond pump.

boilerImmersionHeater.comments: Worcester Bosch combi boiler (installed 2019, last serviced March 2026).

gasFiresWithSurround.comments: Decorative gas fire in the front reception; capped but functional, last serviced 2024.

burglarAlarm.comments: Yale wireless alarm; codes will be transferred at completion.

otherItems.comments: To be removed by the seller prior to completion.

otherItems.itemName: Pendant light fitting in dining room
otherItems.comments: Family heirloom; will be replaced with a plain bayonet fitting before completion.

chimneyStacks.description: Single brick chimney stack to the party wall; pots intact, flaunching sound.

roofCoverings.description: Main pitched roof: concrete interlocking tiles, replaced in 2008. Single-storey rear extension: EPDM flat roof, re-covered 2019.
roofCoverings.advisories: Roof in serviceable condition; routine inspection recommended every five years.

rainwaterPipesGutters.description: Cast-iron gutters to the front and rear elevations; uPVC downpipes (post-2008 replacement).
rainwaterPipesGutters.gutterDefect: Localised paint loss and surface rust on the cast-iron front gutter; cleaning, treatment and repainting recommended within 12 months.

other.description: Japanese knotweed (Reynoutria japonica) identified on the rear boundary, within approximately 4m of the house. Currently being managed under a five-year herbicide treatment plan by a PCA-accredited contractor (started 2024-04, due 2029-04). Insurance-backed guarantee in place; transferable to the buyer at completion.
other.defects: Japanese knotweed within 7m of the dwelling.
other.advisories: Confirm transfer of the treatment-plan guarantee at completion; some lenders require explicit confirmation of an insurance-backed warranty before drawdown.
other.gardens: Front and rear gardens; rear garden bordered by a 1.8m larch-lap fence with the knotweed-affected boundary marked on the management plan.

boundaries.fenceDescription: 1.8m larch-lap timber fencing to side and rear; ownership of the eastern boundary confirmed by title plan.

surveys.agentName: Northwood Building Surveyors Ltd (RICS regulated, Level 3 Home Survey)
